bio: Ann Nicole Geronimo stands as the alliance candidate for President, carrying the platform of responsive leadership, organized action, and visible service for the engineering community.
highlights: Transparent council leadership and regular updates
Student-centered execution of the full GPOA
Stronger coordination across year levels and organizations
plan_of_action: Ann Nicole will lead the council in advancing the full general plan of action, prioritizing student welfare, transparent governance, academic support, and meaningful engagement across the college.
